controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (unique identifiers in financial markets) directions, 2026 (hereinafter the directions)
controls.control_description:
Short title and commencement of the Directions
(1) These Directions shall be called the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India
(Unique Identifiers in Financial Markets) Directions, 2026 (hereinafter the
Directions).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (unique identifiers in financial markets) directions, 2026 (hereinafter the directions)

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description:
(2) Section A of the Directions on implementation of Legal Entity Identifier (LEI)
shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect from january 01, 2027
controls.control_description:
(3) Section B of the Directions on implementation of Unique Transaction Identifier
(UTI) shall come into effect from January 01, 2027.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect from january 01, 2027

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a system provider, who by way of novation interposes between system participants in the transactions admitted for settlement, thereby becoming th
controls.control_description:
(a) 'Central Counterparty (CCP)' shall mean a system provider, who by way of
novation interposes between system participants in the transactions admitted
for settlement, thereby becoming the buyer to every seller and the seller to
every buyer, for the purpose of effecting settlement of their transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a system provider, who by way of novation interposes between system participants in the transactions admitted for settlement, thereby becoming th

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in paragraph 2(a)(ii) of the master direction - reserve bank of india (electronic trading platforms) direction
controls.control_description:
(b) 'Electronic Trading Platform (ETP)' shall have the same meaning as
assigned to it in paragraph 2(a)(ii) of the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of
India (Electronic Trading Platforms) Directions, 2025, dated June 16, 2025, as
amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in paragraph 2(a)(ii) of the master direction - reserve bank of india (electronic trading platforms) direction

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to a market where transactions are undertaken in any manner other than on exchanges and shall include those undertaken on electronic trading pla
controls.control_description:
(c) 'Over-the-counter (OTC) market' shall refer to a market where transactions
are undertaken in any manner other than on exchanges and shall include those
undertaken on electronic trading platforms (ETPs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to a market where transactions are undertaken in any manner other than on exchanges and shall include those undertaken on electronic trading pla

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them in the reserve bank of india act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(2) Words and expressions used, but not defined above, shall have the same
meaning as assigned to them in the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them in the reserve bank of india act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all otc transactions undertaken by entities other than individuals in the markets for government securities, money market instruments
controls.control_description:
Scope of LEI
(1) The LEI code shall be applicable to all OTC transactions undertaken by entities
other than individuals in the markets for Government securities, money market
instruments, foreign exchange instruments and derivatives covered under
section 45U of Chapter III-D of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all otc transactions undertaken by entities other than individuals in the markets for government securities, money market instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable only for transactions involving an amount equivalent to or exceeding usd one million or equivalent thereof in other currencies
controls.control_description:
(2) For users / clients undertaking non-derivative foreign exchange transactions,
the LEI code shall be applicable only for transactions involving an amount
equivalent to or exceeding USD one million or equivalent thereof in other
currencies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable only for transactions involving an amount equivalent to or exceeding usd one million or equivalent thereof in other currencies

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain an lei code from a local operating unit (lou) which is accredited by the global legal entity identifier foundation (gleif)
controls.control_description:
Framework for implementation of LEI
(1) All participants, resident and non-resident, undertaking transactions falling
within the scope of these Direction shall obtain an LEI code from a Local
Operating Unit (LOU) which is accredited by the Global Legal Entity Identifier
Foundation (GLEIF).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain an lei code from a local operating unit (lou) which is accredited by the global legal entity identifier foundation (gleif)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an entity recognised by the reserve bank as an issuer of lei under the payment and settlement systems act, 2007
controls.control_description:
In the case of an LOU in India, the LOU shall be an entity
recognised by the Reserve Bank as an issuer of LEI under the Payment and
Settlement Systems Act, 2007.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an entity recognised by the reserve bank as an issuer of lei under the payment and settlement systems act, 2007

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the lei code of the parent / management company
controls.control_description:
(2) Non-residents that are not legal entities in their country of incorporation (e.g.,
funds operated by a non-resident parent / management company that are each
registered as a Foreign Portfolio Investor) may use the LEI code of the parent
/ management company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the lei code of the parent / management company

controls.control_objective: To ensure capture the lei code of the transacting participants in their systems
controls.control_description:
(3) Entities involved in / responsible for executing transactions, reporting or for
depository functions in the markets regulated by the Reserve Bank shall
capture the LEI code of the transacting participants in their systems.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to capture the lei code of the transacting participants in their systems

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to undertake transactions in the financial markets regulated by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(4) Entities without an LEI code shall not be eligible to undertake transactions in
the financial markets regulated by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to undertake transactions in the financial markets regulated by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that their lei code is considered current under the rules of the global lei system and has not lapsed
controls.control_description:
Entities shall ensure that
their LEI code is considered current under the rules of the global LEI system
and has not lapsed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that their lei code is considered current under the rules of the global lei system and has not lapsed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all otc derivative transactions undertaken in terms of the following directions (hereinafter "governing directions"):
controls.control_description:
Scope of UTI
(1) UTI shall be applicable to all OTC derivative transactions undertaken in terms
of the following directions (hereinafter "Governing Directions"):
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all otc derivative transactions undertaken in terms of the following directions (hereinafter "governing directions"):

controls.control_objective: To ensure 3, 2000) and master direction - risk management and inter-bank dealings (notification no
controls.control_description:
FEMA.25/RB-2000 dated May 3, 2000)
and Master Direction - Risk Management and Inter-Bank Dealings
(Notification no.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 3, 2000) and master direction - risk management and inter-bank dealings (notification no

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by the reserve bank
controls.control_description: (e) Any other Direction(s), as may be specified by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be generated / reported for all transactions in otc derivatives market undertaken in terms of the governing directions
controls.control_description:
Framework for implementation of UTI
(1) UTI shall be generated / reported for all transactions in OTC derivatives market
undertaken in terms of the Governing Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be generated / reported for all transactions in otc derivatives market undertaken in terms of the governing directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to otc derivative transactions entered into on or after the date the directions come into effect
controls.control_description:
The directions shall be
applicable to OTC derivative transactions entered into on or after the date the
directions come into effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to otc derivative transactions entered into on or after the date the directions come into effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be generated in accordance with the uti technical guidance issued by the committee on payments and market infrastructures (cpmi) - international organ
controls.control_description:
(2) UTI shall be generated in accordance with the UTI Technical Guidance issued
by the Committee on Payments and Market Infrastructures (CPMI) -
International Organisation of Securities Commissions (IOSCO) in February
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be generated in accordance with the uti technical guidance issued by the committee on payments and market infrastructures (cpmi) - international organ

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a maximum of 52 characters comprising the lei of the generating entity followed by a unique identifier and shall be unique to a derivative transa
controls.control_description:
It shall have a maximum of 52 characters comprising the LEI of the
generating entity followed by a unique identifier and shall be unique to a
derivative transaction throughout its lifecycle.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a maximum of 52 characters comprising the lei of the generating entity followed by a unique identifier and shall be unique to a derivative transa

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined as per the waterfall in table 1 with the responsibility of uti generation assigned to the next entity in the waterfall in case the ident
controls.control_description:
(3) The UTI generating entity shall be determined as per the waterfall in Table
1 with the responsibility of UTI generation assigned to the next entity in the
waterfall in case the identified UTI generating entity is unable or unwilling to
generate the UTI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined as per the waterfall in table 1 with the responsibility of uti generation assigned to the next entity in the waterfall in case the ident

controls.control_objective: To ensure generate the uti for the transaction
controls.control_description:
In terms of the waterfall, if a transaction is reported to the
Clearing Corporation of India Limited - Trade Repository (CCIL-TR) without
the UTI, the CCIL-TR shall generate the UTI for the transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to generate the uti for the transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake reasonable efforts to ensure that the uti is obtained and reported within the reporting deadline for the transaction
controls.control_description:
(4) For transactions that are reportable in India and in a foreign jurisdiction and
the foreign jurisdiction has a sooner reporting timeline, market participants may
undertake reasonable efforts to ensure that the UTI is obtained and reported
within the reporting deadline for the transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake reasonable efforts to ensure that the uti is obtained and reported within the reporting deadline for the transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain and submit the uti to ccil-tr at the earliest thereafter, but in any case, within five mumbai business days from the date of the transaction
controls.control_description:
In case the market participant
is unable to obtain the UTI within the reporting deadline, the market participant
may obtain and submit the UTI to CCIL-TR at the earliest thereafter, but in any
case, within five Mumbai business days from the date of the transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to obtain and submit the uti to ccil-tr at the earliest thereafter, but in any case, within five mumbai business days from the date of the transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure necessitate the generation of a new uti
controls.control_description:
(5) Amendments to a derivative contract, post reporting to the CCIL-TR, shall not
necessitate the generation of a new UTI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to necessitate the generation of a new uti

controls.control_objective: To ensure necessitate the generation of a new uti
controls.control_description:
However, a lifecycle event such as
novation that results in the creation of a new reportable derivative contract, as
per extant reporting guidelines, shall necessitate the generation of a new UTI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to necessitate the generation of a new uti

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue the operating guidelines and reporting formats for reporting of uti
controls.control_description:
(6) CCIL shall issue the operating guidelines and reporting formats for reporting of
UTI.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to issue the operating guidelines and reporting formats for reporting of uti

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that necessary arrangements are put in place for ensuring compliance with these directions
controls.control_description:
(7) Market participants shall ensure that necessary arrangements are put in place
for ensuring compliance with these directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that necessary arrangements are put in place for ensuring compliance with these directions
